title: centaurea × bourlieri
intro: Centaurea × bourlieri, a hybrid plant of the Centaurea genus, is a flowering plant known for its vibrant purple flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. Centaurea × bourlieri offers health benefits such as relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, and its flowers can be dried and used in potpourri or as a garnish.
